name: The Senapatis Vol-1
overview: Based on real events that took place in 1971-1984, The Senapatis Vol-1 follows the journey of a refugee family from erstwhile East Pakistan who travels to Kolkata, India, only to become the country's leading underworld force of the time.

trailers.title: THE SENAPATIS- Official Trailer | Prriyam  | Suvajit | Joy | Riingo | Addatimes
